name: Off The Chains Disc Golf Demo

reviews.review_description: Come on man! Super stoked to have a disc golf game and this is what we produce?? Just like every other IRL Disc golfer this is a joke, I’ve played about 36 holes and changed all my settings to attempt a feel for the game. With a flick of my wrist my putter goes 120+ feet? Not a thing btw. How about you guys crawl out of your parents basement, go to a disc golf course (yes it’s outside) and observe the actual game your simulating! As a avid bowler as well the simulations from the bowling games are far superior and I imagine the coding for hand position, strength/speed and variable release positions are very similar. Call them up and learn how to code a game for sports correctly. No wonder you got zero actual disc golf sponsors…
Took a while to get the hang of it but getting there look forward to harder longer courses and more discs. Recomended

It was an improvised download. Very entertaining. My only issue is that the full version is not out yet. I want to play multiplayer with my son, as this seems more fun as a family event than a solo experience.

I wasn't happy with a different Disc Golf game I bought so I went looking for something better, this is definitely the one to get! This game has a focus on disc physics and lets you choose different discs with different flight properties, it feels natural and feels like a skill you can work on and improve. I haven't tried multiplayer yet but I'm excited to!

reviews.review_title: Best Disc Golf game on VR
reviews.review_description: Love this game and find myself going back to it whenever I can to try and beat my personal best scores on each course. No doubt that leader boards and challenges will be coming soon. The developers are great! They’re listening to our feedback and modifying the game play until it’s perfect. Worth the purchase because it’s only going to get better with time.

If you actually play disc golf don't expect this to be some sort of training aide or anything close to the real thing. Look forward at the basket and throw a frisbee throw, anything else will send the disc going in wide directions. The putting is also very hard to get correct unless you do it very slowly. 

That being said, it's really fun to navigate the course and toss the discs around. Not a bad solution if you're cooped up and want to play a round but can't.

reviews.review_title: I physically can not play vr disc games.
reviews.review_description:
I physically can not play vr disc games.
It's not the games' fault though.
The only holding position that all vr disc share is a 90° angle from the hand,
with all four fingers under the lip.
This is completely alien to how I fling frisbees.
This game's fore arm/hand throw has you holding the disc at a 180° angle (straight line) forward from the hand.
My natural holding position for both is closer to a 45° angle for both throwing styles,
allowing the disc to roll off my fingers as I throw.

My initial review was not positive. Like the opinion of most IRL discgolfers this game does not deliver as a real world replacement. However, after having downloaded and tried this again I think it does a fine virtual job.
My tip: If you are thinking you can bring your real world throw to this your wrong - try throwing the disc out in front of you like a putt using a static stance and facing your goal. Use a sort of granny push putt and use your wrist to spin the disc out. Your arm speed and wrist flick will determine distance and angle.

reviews.review_title: Delivers on what it claims to be 😀
reviews.review_description:
It’s BETA so it delivers so far for me. Excited to see where it builds on from here ?

I guess I throw a disc in here exactly as I would in the real world , all over-the-place and as inaccurate as is humanly possible 🤪 So can not really comment on the “physics” of the game yet , that would be unfair as it probably is my throwing technique currently.

4 stars stay IF it is not my technique but the actual game mechanics creating the huge shot totals each hole.
IF I actually improve my throws over time and at least get some cages “on-par” then I will up it to 5 stars.

The game did hold my attention though , for a whole 60% battery charge , and stopped me playing In Death Unchained . ( Very, very rare) so I was focussed and determined enough to try and get farther and closer to each cage and did genuinely enjoy the whole experience. Again another superb example of how VR brings a whole different experience to gaming.

Give it a go  and have a throw !

My mind naturally wants to think of gripping the controller as the disc, meaning I hold the quest 2 controller flat (controller ring perpendicular to the ground). However, if I throw like this, I am putting extreme hyzer on the disc. Also, IRL discs seem to have more nose angle correction (or maybe tactile awareness allows our coordination to correct this more easily), while the game seems to take a more literal approach. Basically, everything I have done in real life to throw the disc flatter and keep my nose angle hurts my in-game throw . Also, anytime I putt farther than 35 ft (even shorter if I try to spin putt), I seem throw like 80ft - 100ft. I want the game to succeed, but it's not worth buying without these options or corrections.

reviews.review_title: Amazing! Best disc golf sim on Oculus
reviews.review_description:
The latest physics update was an amazing improvement. Discs fly and react like a real disc. Beautiful realistic environment, nice ambient music. Can't wait for the full release! 

Only complaints are that occasionally it won't automatically take me to my next shot and will have me throw from where I just was if I don't manually travel to the spot. The OB line is REALLY touchy, and it calls some shots OB that really shouldn't be that are right on the line.  I also have a heck of a time keeping forehand throws flat. If I follow through at all, they always end up almost in a tomahawk even though I've got a great forehand IRL.

reviews.review_title: The most realistic VR Disc Golf
reviews.review_description:
This game is terrific and the devs have done a great job porting the PCVR version over to the Quest platform. This isn't a gimmicky VR disc golf game, the physics behind it are always being tweaked and updated based on user feedback with the intention of getting the experience to feel as close to real life as possible.  With just a little practice you'll notice your real life throwing motions translate into the game with very satisfying results.  The variety of discs to unlock gives it a nice sense of progression, and the courses are very well designed and resemble courses you'd visit IRL.  It's just a ton of fun to play and keep coming back to - solo or multiplayer.

The game is constantly being updated and the devs are incredibly involved with the player-base. Definitely recommend it!

I downloaded this on a whim, but much to my amazement I fell in love. I have only been playing with the 2 start up discs ...until I realized you can unlock different discs. Sure to say that had me enthralled until my headset was dying. This game is so fun, challenging, and relaxing at the same time. I can't wait for the full game.

Fun gameplay with a bit too realistic physics inside of an almost real life environment. I like the way you unlock discs over time. The built in tutorial videos is a welcome touch. Haven't tested the multiplayer yet. The pace of the gameplay is a bit slow, I feel like I am waiting for popups more than playing and moving to each shot or course. 

Requests:
- Waist slots for each of the three discs. Even though the disc bag is more realistic, it's just not practical in VR. Too easy to select the wrong disc which is just frustrating. Plus trying to find the bag each time is a pain. Having waist slots makes it easier to know where your discs are at all times.
- Have the data information that pops up after every throw be optional or at least come up faster. I spend more time waiting on these pop ups, brings me out immersion. I would rather just keep moving between throws. 
- Have an auto-aim option similar to Disc Ninja. This is a nice crutch until you get the feel of the courses. Or at least an adjustable buffer on throws.
- The sound effects when selecting discs and menu buttons is quite awful.

Nice game, good mechanics. Still need some work, but as expected for a beta.
Multiplayer is a little buggy (can not see the other guys Disc when throwing)
Nice touch with the hidden menu on the watch
Keep it up:)!

Great game, looks cool tweety birds chirping away in the trees, nice relaxing game, until you miss a simple shot ..then you call yourself lotsa names for missing as your mate just beat you. Defo recommend this game to everyone,  lotsa fun, cool courses to play, worth getting as you will play it alot....hahaha

reviews.review_title: Best VR golf (so far) on the Quest
reviews.review_description: As a real life disc golfer, I know there's no way to get the exact same throw mechanics in the game as real life but this is pretty good to satisfy my needs on a rainy day. I feel like the throwing is consistent enough to improve on each round and progress through the game without frustration from random inputs. The course's sights and sounds are done in a realistic style which is a nice change from the cartoonish style of other games.

reviews.review_title: If you want to play real disc golf in VR
reviews.review_description: Having played the beta it's obvious that the developers want to bring real disc golf to VR. Load up your bag,  grab some friends,  and work on your snap and your follow through as you play in realistic environments with accurately flying discs.

I play disc golf and this is amazing! The game is incredible and has so much more potential. I hope to see it keep getting updates!! Absolutely a five star for the price and quality, an absolute steal. Creators or dev. team definitely put some genuine disc golf knowledge and love into this. The multiplayer has given me no issues, and navigating the menus is incredibly simple. Can’t stress enough navigating the menu and buying/building bags is fun and intuitive. Sorry for the lengthy review, but I would love to see this game get more attention. More updates please, more everything! Not criticizing just hurry it up!! Oh and the forehand is tricky as lleh< small critique that’s it folks!

reviews.review_title: Cant wait for the full version
reviews.review_description: Best demo I've played yet
